vault_purpose: Anti-link-rot local cache of structural code-to-knowledge graph parsing definitions. Hardcoded from safishamsi/graphify code-to-knowledge-graph patterns. No runtime fetch — this file IS the schema.
core_concept: Transform a codebase into a queryable knowledge graph where nodes are code entities (files, functions, classes, variables) and edges are relationships (calls, imports, defines, depends-on). The graph enables the harness to answer structural questions without reading every file.

node_types.description: A source file in the repository.
A variable, constant, or field declaration.

edge_types.description: File A imports from file B.
File or module A depends on B (transitive of imports + package deps).
Class A implements interface B or extends class B.
Entity A references entity B (variable usage, type annotation, etc.).

javascript_typescript.edge_generation: imports → imports edge, call expressions → calls edge, class heritage → implements edge, variable usage → references edge

python.edge_generation: imports → imports edge, calls → calls edge, class bases → implements edge, name usage → references edge

extract: nested keys as config_entry nodes with dotted path
cross-references to file paths as references edges
json_yaml_toml.edge_generation: key values containing file paths → references edge to file node

extract: code blocks with file paths as references
inline links to files as documents edges
markdown.edge_generation: links to source files → documents edge, code block language tags → language property on file nodes

query_patterns.name: impact_analysis
query_patterns.question: If I change file X, what else breaks?
query_patterns.graph_query: Find all nodes with an imports or depends_on edge TO file X. Recursively expand for transitive dependencies.
query_patterns.use_case: Before editing a shared module, understand the blast radius.

query_patterns.name: dead_code_detection
query_patterns.question: Which functions are never called?
query_patterns.graph_query: Find all function nodes with zero incoming calls edges. Filter out exported functions (they may be called externally).

query_patterns.name: circular_dependency
query_patterns.question: Are there circular import chains?
query_patterns.graph_query: Detect cycles in the imports edge graph (DFS with visited set).

query_patterns.name: orphan_documentation
query_patterns.question: Which docs reference files that no longer exist?
query_patterns.graph_query: Find documents edges where the target file node doesn't exist in the graph.

query_patterns.name: entry_point_tracing
query_patterns.question: What's the call chain from entry point to function X?
query_patterns.graph_query: BFS/DFS from entry point node following calls edges until target function is reached.

query_patterns.name: config_dependency
query_patterns.question: Which code reads config key X?
query_patterns.graph_query: Find config_entry node for key X. Find all references edges from function/class nodes to this config_entry.
query_patterns.use_case: Config change impact, dead config detection.

harness_integration.scout_worker: Scout can query the knowledge graph instead of reading files directly. 'Find all callers of function X' → graph query, not 10 file reads.
harness_integration.gap_scan: The gap-scan skill can use the graph to identify untested code paths (functions with no test references).
harness_integration.auditor: The Auditor can check for circular dependencies, dead code, and orphan docs via graph queries.
harness_integration.memory: The knowledge graph can be persisted as a cold-layer artifact, enabling cross-session structural queries without re-parsing.

build_and_refresh.trigger: On first deploy, after significant code changes (>5 files modified), or on explicit request.
build_and_refresh.method: Parse all source files per language rules → generate nodes and edges → serialize to JSON graph file at .agents/knowledge_graph.json
build_and_refresh.incremental: On file change, re-parse only the changed file and update its nodes/edges. Full rebuild only on explicit request or schema change.
build_and_refresh.storage: .agents/knowledge_graph.json (cold layer, grep/query only, not read in full at BOOT)

honest_clause: If the codebase uses a language not in parsing_rules, label the graph as 'partial — language X not parsed'. Do not fabricate edges for unparsed files. Report coverage percentage.

integration_points.canon: distill/canon/ (graph is a cold-layer tool, not a canon rule)
integration_points.docs: Docs/01-Architecture.md (mentioned as optional structural analysis tool)
integration_points.skill: distill/skills/ (future graphify skill can wrap this schema)
integration_points.entry_injection: Not injected into entry files — the graph is an optional analysis layer, not a mandatory rule
